boss.name: Boss
boss.description: Used for the items that spawn after killing a boss in a Boss Room.

shellGame.name: Shell Game
shellGame.description: Despite its name, this item pool is currently not used by {{i|Shell Game}} and is only internally used by {{i|Bag of Crafting}}.
